serve_commands.mtp:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
export VLLM_ENGINE_READY_TIMEOUT_S=3600
vllm serve deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Flash \
  --trust-remote-code \
  --kv-cache-dtype fp8 \
  --block-size 256 \
  --enable-expert-parallel \
  --tensor-parallel-size 8 \
  --attention_config.use_fp4_indexer_cache=True \
  --moe-backend deep_gemm_mega_moe \
  --tokenizer-mode deepseek_v4 \
  --tool-call-parser deepseek_v4 \
  --enable-auto-tool-choice \
  --speculative_config '{"method":"mtp","num_speculative_tokens":2}' \
  --reasoning-parser deepseek_v4

contents.report: Readable baseline report with correctness, performance, and cost metrics.
contents.generation: Directory-driven writing, translation, and coding transcripts.
contents.smoke: no-MTP and MTP chat smoke request/response captures.
contents.toolcall15: no-MTP and MTP ToolCall-15 traces and scores.
contents.kv_layout: Synthetic packed KV byte-layout snapshots for indexer-cache regressions.
contents.long_context: Long-context sentinel retrieval probes for cache-layout regressions.
contents.prefix_cache: Concurrent long-prefix cache reuse probes with request-level timing plus KV/runtime telemetry.
contents.streaming_pressure: Optional short concurrent streaming-pressure soak with request timing plus KV/runtime telemetry.
contents.evals: Optional lm_eval accuracy summaries such as GSM8K exact match.
contents.performance: Benchmark, runtime, and GPU telemetry summaries.
